final:
module counter2bit_en (
    input clk,
    input rst,
    input en,
    output reg [1:0] count
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge rst or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (rst) begin
        count <= 2'b00;
    end else if (en) begin
        count <= count + 1;
    end
end

endmodule
